positive: A cinematic, hyper-detailed scene of a cyberpunk alleyway at night. Neon signs reflect off wet pavement, illuminating holographic Japanese characters and steam rising from vents. Synthwave aesthetic, deep blues, magentas, and electric cyan. Concept art, volumetric lighting, 8k resolution.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, oversaturated, cartoony
